commit.subject: LU-000 tests: sanity test_69 on arm - 2.7
commit.message:
LU-000 tests: sanity test_69 on arm - 2.7

Test with patchset 20 of https://review.whamcloud.com/36144
and debug traces.
Another try to convert MAX_DIO_SIZE to u64.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: env=ONLY=69 testlist=sanity clientdistro=el8.1 clientarch=aarch64 mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 osscount=1 ostcount=7
Test-Parameters: env=ONLY=69 testlist=sanity clientdistro=el8.1 clientarch=x86_64 mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 osscount=1 ostcount=7
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I0e8d4db7ab8a77aba0600788cca9403f7c52f8c7
